description: Your Canvaspace management dashboard.
Plus button to find the create Canva workspace User Interface
Create a Canva workspace by filling the details of your choice.
You can also update the details when ever you feel there needs to be changes and hit Save Workspace.
Now the Canvaspace is created, click on the skew double arrow icon that to enter the Canva Workspace(Canvaspace).

Go to and click on the icon at the top left, under the header navigation. This is the Canvaspace hub to see canvaspace details, access layouts to create different type of data, adjust canva size, and more.

The Fragment Hub enables you to create different types of data within the Canvaspace. The Help button leads you to the Academy page to train user how to use MindCanvas correctly which is how you get trained now.

Click Fragment Hub to show the available ways of creating a Fragment, in our case you have 5 types of fragments you can use, play with it. Click Text to display the layout, drag it around, click save.

The Delete button opnes a box to confirm delete the current canvas and its data. Deleting any kind of data is risky. The refresh button is an extra for when the page did not load properly due to possible internet issues.
Click the 'i' icon on the left of the Data Fragment for options.
Click Edit to display the edit window where you can type new information in on the right hand side.

Use 'Copy to Clipboard' to save typing stress. When ready, Paste it using 'Write Text' for text and 'Write Link' for the Link Fragment,  add more info by typing it in and hit the Update button to save your extra data.
To close the Data Fragment, click the X on the to pright of the Fragment window to hide the input layout.

When clicking on the 'i' icon, you will see the Reorganize data fragment; It enables you to store the already create data at a new xy position using the Update Coordinates button. When finished, click 'I'm done' to collapse the drag window.
Lastly, There are two buttons, one which looks like a shield that prevents accidental deletion of data when clicked on the other button seen as 'Delete' removes that single fragment permanently.
Congratulations on completing these tasks. Others give up and you didn't.
Keep an eye on notifications at the edges of the screen when creating, changing and deleting data; they are important.
Navigate back to the Canvas Management page and click on the Account Info text on the top middle. This is your account profile.
Be advised: Only follow the following step to remove your account, otherwise just read and do not execute the next instruction.
Click the Unlock button to disable the lock that prevents accidental account deletion; this action is irreversible. It's instant. All your data will be permanently deleted.
